TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - L3 + AI (12 mo. commitment)
TimeEntry.Notes: DrFace.com has completed a comprehensive SEO and technical overhaul guided by a detailed SEMrush audit to improve search visibility, performance, and overall user experience. Major enhancements include fixing broken links, improving mobile responsiveness, simplifying site navigation, implementing advanced caching for faster load times, and verifying analytics and XML sitemap functionality. JSON-LD Schema has been integrated to enhance visibility in Google Rich Results and AI-driven search experiences. While SMTP and form configurations are complete, final email delivery activation is still pending. The next phase will focus on resolving any remaining crawl errors and further refining site architecture. In addition, a structured six-month blog strategy has been launched—covering the SEO improvements, local SEO, services, industry trends, team insights, and a year-in-review—to support sustained organic growth, stronger performance, and increased user engagement.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - L3 + AI (12 mo. commitment)
My SEO - L3 + AI (12 mo. commitment)
TimeEntry.Notes: Found and documented issues with duplicate title tags and meta descriptions across the site, analyzed their impact on SEO, and outlined corrective actions to resolve duplicates and improve unique, keyword-rich metadata throughout.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - L3 + AI (12 mo. commitment)
My SEO - L3 + AI (12 mo. commitment)
TimeEntry.Notes: Today's task involves auditing the DrFace website to address key SEO issues. First, identify and fix duplicate content across the site to ensure unique, optimized text. Next, review and correct any H1 tag issues, ensuring each page has a single, appropriate H1 tag for proper hierarchy. Lastly, resolve duplicate title tag issues by creating distinct and relevant titles for each page to improve search engine visibility and user experience.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - L3 + AI (12 mo. commitment)
TimeEntry.Notes: DrFace.com has completed a comprehensive SEO and technical overhaul based on a detailed SEMrush audit to improve search visibility, performance, and user experience. Major updates include fixing broken links, enhancing mobile responsiveness, simplifying site navigation, implementing advanced caching for faster load times, and verifying analytics and XML sitemap functionality. JSON-LD Schema has been integrated to improve visibility in Google Rich Results and AI-driven search. While SMTP and form configurations are complete, final email delivery activation is still pending. The next phase will focus on resolving any remaining crawl errors and refining site architecture. Additionally, a structured six-month blog strategy has been launched, covering SEO improvements, local SEO, services, industry trends, team insights, and a year-in-review, to drive sustained organic growth, improved performance, and increased user engagement.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - L3 + AI (12 mo. commitment)
My SEO - L3 + AI (12 mo. commitment)
TimeEntry.Notes:
Performing a thorough SEO audit for the DrFace website involves addressing several critical areas to ensure optimal performance in search engines and enhance user experience. Here is a detailed breakdown of the work task, structured into key components:

 Identify and Fix Duplicate Content

  • Problem: Duplicate content occurs when the same text appears on multiple pages across the website. This can confuse search engines and result in a poor ranking as Google may not know which page to prioritize.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - L3 + AI (12 mo. commitment)
TimeEntry.Notes: DrFace.com has successfully completed a thorough SEO and technical overhaul based on insights from a detailed SEMrush audit, aiming to enhance search visibility, site performance, and user experience. Key updates include the resolution of broken links, improved mobile responsiveness, simplified site navigation, advanced caching for faster load times, and confirmation of analytics and XML sitemap functionality. JSON-LD Schema has also been integrated to boost visibility in Google Rich Results and AI-powered search. While SMTP and form configurations are finalized, email delivery activation is still in progress. The next phase will focus on fixing remaining crawl errors and optimizing the site architecture. A structured six-month blog plan has been launched, covering SEO improvements, local SEO, services, industry trends, team insights, and a year-in-review, to drive sustained organic growth, enhanced performance, and greater user engagement.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - L3 + AI (12 mo. commitment)
TimeEntry.Notes: Reviewed the DR Face website by examining its structure and performance. Searched for error logs to identify any issues affecting functionality. Additionally, checked for broken links throughout the site using diagnostic tools. Corrected any errors and fixed broken links to enhance the user experience and ensure smooth website operation.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - L3 + AI (12 mo. commitment)
TimeEntry.Notes: Worked on internal linking for DrFace, optimizing the website’s structure by strategically adding relevant links to improve navigation, SEO, and overall user experience for better site engagement and visibility.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - L3 + AI (12 mo. commitment)
My SEO - L3 + AI (12 mo. commitment)
TimeEntry.Notes:
DrFace.com has successfully completed a comprehensive SEO and technical optimization process, guided by insights from a detailed SEMrush audit. The goal of these updates is to improve search engine visibility, website performance, and overall user experience.

Key improvements include resolving broken links, enhancing mobile responsiveness, simplifying site navigation, implementing advanced caching for faster page load times, and verifying the proper functioning of analytics tracking and the XML sitemap. In addition, JSON-LD Schema markup has been integrated to increase the site’s chances of appearing in Google Rich Results and AI-powered search features.

SMTP and form configurations have been finalized, while email delivery activation is currently in progress. The upcoming phase will focus on addressing remaining crawl errors and further refining the site architecture to strengthen overall SEO performance.

To support ongoing growth, a structured six-month blog strategy has been launched. The content plan will cover SEO improvements, local SEO topics, service-focused content, industry trends, team insights, and an annual review. This approach is designed to drive consistent organic traffic, improve site performance, and enhance user engagement over time.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - L3 + AI (12 mo. commitment)
My SEO - L3 + AI (12 mo. commitment)
TimeEntry.Notes: Broken links were searched for on the Dr. Face website. Identified errors were fixed by updating or removing faulty links. Necessary corrections were made to ensure all links were functional, improving website navigation and overall user experience.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - L3 + AI (12 mo. commitment)
TimeEntry.Notes: Worked on resolving duplicate meta tags for DrFace, ensuring unique and optimized tags for each page to improve SEO, eliminate indexing issues, and enhance search engine visibility.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - L3 + AI (12 mo. commitment)
TimeEntry.Notes: Today I worked on the SEO audit for the DrFace website, focusing on identifying and fixing duplicate content issues. I reviewed multiple pages on the site to check if the same or very similar content was appearing in different locations, which can confuse search engines and negatively affect rankings. The task involved analyzing the pages, noting duplicate sections, and planning solutions such as rewriting content, applying canonical tags, or using redirects so that search engines clearly understand which page should be prioritized in search results. This work helps improve the website’s SEO performance and ensures better visibility in search engines.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - L3 + AI (12 mo. commitment)
TimeEntry.Notes: DrFace.com has successfully completed a comprehensive SEO and technical optimization process, informed by a detailed SEMrush audit, with the aim of improving search engine visibility, site performance, and user experience. Key updates include resolving broken links, enhancing mobile responsiveness, streamlining site navigation, implementing advanced caching for faster page load times, and ensuring proper analytics tracking and XML sitemap functionality. Additionally, JSON-LD Schema markup has been integrated to boost the site’s chances of appearing in Google Rich Results and AI-powered search features. While SMTP and form configurations are complete, email delivery activation is still in progress. The next phase will focus on resolving remaining crawl errors and further refining the site architecture to strengthen SEO performance. To sustain long-term growth, a structured six-month blog strategy has been launched, covering SEO improvements, local SEO, service-focused content, industry trends, team insights, and an annual review to drive consistent organic traffic, enhance site performance, and improve user engagement over time.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - L3 + AI (12 mo. commitment)
TimeEntry.Notes: DrFace.com has successfully completed a comprehensive SEO and technical optimization phase based on insights from a detailed SEMrush audit, aimed at improving search engine visibility, website performance, and user experience. Key improvements include fixing broken links, enhancing mobile responsiveness, simplifying site navigation, implementing advanced caching for faster load times, and ensuring proper analytics tracking along with an optimized XML sitemap. JSON-LD Schema markup has also been added to increase eligibility for Google Rich Results and AI-powered search features. While SMTP and form configurations have been completed, email delivery activation is still in progress. The next phase will focus on resolving remaining crawl errors and further refining the site architecture. Additionally, a structured six-month blog strategy has been launched to support long-term growth through targeted SEO content, local SEO, service highlights, industry insights, team features, and an annual performance review to drive consistent organic traffic and improve overall user engagement.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - L3 + AI (12 mo. commitment)
TimeEntry.Notes: Checked meta tag–related issues on the DrFace website and updated title tags, meta descriptions, and other on-page elements to improve SEO performance, search visibility, and proper indexing by search engines.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - L3 + AI (12 mo. commitment)
TimeEntry.Notes: Searched for the Dr Face website error using SEMrush to identify issues affecting site performance and visibility. Located a 404 error impacting specific pages, reviewed the affected URLs, and implemented the necessary fixes to resolve the broken link. Verified that the pages were accessible again to ensure proper indexing and improved website functionality.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - L3 + AI (12 mo. commitment)
TimeEntry.Notes: Performed the same review process for the Dr Face website by checking and resolving Falcon-related errors to ensure the site functions properly. Additionally, used SEMrush to identify broken links, reviewed the affected pages, and noted the links that need correction to improve the website’s usability and SEO performance.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - L3 + AI (12 mo. commitment)
TimeEntry.Notes:
DrFace.com has recently completed a major SEO and technical optimization phase designed to improve search visibility, website performance, and overall user experience. Several key enhancements were implemented, including fixing broken links, improving mobile responsiveness, simplifying site navigation, and introducing advanced caching to ensure faster page loading times. The website also now includes proper analytics tracking and an optimized XML sitemap to support better search engine indexing.

In addition, JSON-LD Schema markup has been integrated to increase the site’s eligibility for Google Rich Results and emerging AI-powered search features. SMTP and form configurations have been completed, and the email delivery system is currently in the final stage of activation.

The next stage will focus on addressing remaining crawl issues and further refining the website’s architecture for improved efficiency and usability. To support long-term digital growth, a structured six-month blog content plan has also been introduced. This strategy focuses on targeted SEO content, local search optimization, service highlights, industry insights, team spotlights, and an annual performance review to help drive consistent organic traffic and strengthen user engagement.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - L3 + AI (12 mo. commitment)
TimeEntry.Notes: Checked DrFace pages returning 4XX status codes, identified the cause of the errors, and resolved the issues by fixing broken links, permissions, or incorrect redirects to restore proper functionality.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - L3 + AI (12 mo. commitment)
TimeEntry.Notes: Searched through the error logs of the DrFace website to identify broken or malfunctioning links causing user issues. After pinpointing the problematic links, updated URLs, replaced outdated links, or implemented redirects to ensure proper functionality and seamless navigation. This fix enhanced user experience by reducing errors and improving site performance.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - L3 + AI (12 mo. commitment)
TimeEntry.Notes: Write and submit a blog post on the DrFace website "How to Choose the Right Non-Surgical Treatments for Your Skin Type" On-page SEO for the blog.This includes optimizing the title tag, meta description, and header tags with relevant keywords. The content should be structured for SEO by using appropriate keywords, adding internal and external links, optimizing images, and ensuring a mobile-friendly design. Additionally, the URL should be concise and keyword-rich to improve search engine visibility and user engagement.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - L3 + AI (12 mo. commitment)
TimeEntry.Notes: The task involves auditing the DrFace.com site using SEMrush to identify SEO and technical issues. Key errors found include a title tag that is too long (drface.com_title_element_is_too_long) and internal resources blocked from crawling (drface.com_disallowed_internal_resources). The work focuses on optimizing title lengths for search visibility, reviewing robots.txt or meta tags to allow important resources, and ensuring the site meets SEO best practices to improve indexing and ranking.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - L3 + AI (12 mo. commitment)
TimeEntry.Notes: Checked and fixed broken links on DrFace website, including internal links and external images. Identified issues, corrected the internal navigation, and ensured external images loaded properly for improved user experience.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - L3 + AI (12 mo. commitment)
TimeEntry.Notes: Errors on the DrFace website were identified through a thorough search, and issues with broken or malfunctioning links were fixed. Necessary adjustments were made to ensure smooth navigation and functionality across the site, enhancing the user experience and resolving any accessibility problems related to the website’s links.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - L3 + AI (12 mo. commitment)
TimeEntry.Notes: Optimized image alt text and implemented internal linking for DrFace’s website, improving SEO, accessibility, and user navigation by ensuring proper image descriptions and creating effective internal connections between relevant pages.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - L3 + AI (12 mo. commitment)
TimeEntry.Notes: Write and submit a blog post on the DrFace website "HydraFacial: An Innovative Approach to Skin Health & Rejuvenation " On-page SEO for the blog.This includes optimizing the title tag, meta description, and header tags with relevant keywords. The content should be structured for SEO by using appropriate keywords, adding internal and external links, optimizing images, and ensuring a mobile-friendly design. Additionally, the URL should be concise and keyword-rich to improve search engine visibility and user engagement.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - L3 + AI (12 mo. commitment)
TimeEntry.Notes:
DrFace.com has recently completed an extensive SEO and technical optimization phase designed to enhance search visibility, boost website performance, and improve the user experience. Key updates include fixing broken links, improving mobile responsiveness, simplifying site navigation, and implementing advanced caching techniques to speed up page load times. The site now also benefits from accurate analytics tracking and an optimized XML sitemap to facilitate better search engine indexing.

In addition, JSON-LD Schema markup has been incorporated to improve the site's chances of achieving Google Rich Results and benefiting from AI-powered search features. SMTP and form configurations are now complete, with the email delivery system on the verge of final activation.

The next phase will focus on addressing remaining crawl issues and fine-tuning the website's architecture for greater efficiency and usability. To ensure sustained digital growth, a structured six-month blog content plan has been put in place. This plan is centered around creating targeted SEO-driven content, optimizing local search, highlighting services, sharing industry insights, featuring team spotlights, and conducting annual performance reviews to consistently drive organic traffic and enhance user engagement.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - L3 + AI (12 mo. commitment)
TimeEntry.Notes: Errors and broken links on the DrFace website were identified and addressed. The faulty links were fixed by updating or replacing them with the correct URLs. Other errors were resolved to ensure proper functionality, improving the website’s user experience and ensuring smooth navigation across all pages.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - L3 + AI (12 mo. commitment)
TimeEntry.Notes: Checked and resolved issues with blocked internal resources in robots.txt and addressed pages lacking meta descriptions, ensuring proper indexing and improved SEO performance for better visibility in search engine results.

Additionally, the URL should be concise and keyword-rich to improve search engine visibility and user engagement.

The site now features accurate analytics tracking, an optimized XML sitemap for better indexing, and JSON-LD Schema markup to support Google Rich Results and AI-powered search features. TimeEntry.Title: New Entry: User Registration Form (ID #14052) : Robinson Facial Plastic Surgery.
TimeEntry.Notes: As per telephonic conversation with client, they are receiving rapid amount of testing mails from their own platform. So, I hold them and update to Puneet to take a look on it.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - L3 + AI (12 mo. commitment)
TimeEntry.Notes: Searched for broken links on the DrFace website by conducting a comprehensive link audit. Identified any broken or outdated links that were disrupting the user experience. Took the required actions to resolve the issues, either by updating the links or implementing redirects, ensuring seamless navigation and enhancing the website's functionality.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - L3 + AI (12 mo. commitment)
TimeEntry.Notes: Broken links and errors were thoroughly checked on the website. Each link was tested to ensure proper functionality, and any broken links were fixed. Additionally, common website errors, such as missing images or incorrect redirects, were identified and corrected to enhance the user experience and ensure smooth navigation.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - L3 + AI (12 mo. commitment)
TimeEntry.Notes: Worked on SEO optimization for DrFace, focusing on keyword research, on-page improvements, content enhancement, meta tags, and backlinks to increase organic traffic, improve search rankings, and boost online visibility.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - L3 + AI (12 mo. commitment)
TimeEntry.Notes: Write and submit a blog post on the DrFace website "The Truth About Recovery Time After Facial Surgery " On-page SEO for the blog.This includes optimizing the title tag, meta description, and header tags with relevant keywords. The content should be structured for SEO by using appropriate keywords, adding internal and external links, optimizing images, and ensuring a mobile-friendly design. Additionally, the URL should be concise and keyword-rich to improve search engine visibility and user engagement.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - L3 + AI (12 mo. commitment)
TimeEntry.Notes: For today's audit of the DrFace website, I focused on resolving SEO issues, specifically addressing the problem of an excessively long title element. The task involved shortening the website’s title tag to improve search engine optimization, ensuring it’s within the ideal length range for better visibility in search results. Additionally, I reviewed other aspects of the site to ensure it meets SEO best practices for improved user experience and search ranking.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - L3 + AI (12 mo. commitment)
TimeEntry.Notes: DrFace.com has recently undergone a comprehensive SEO and technical overhaul to improve search visibility, website performance, and the overall user experience. Key updates included fixing broken links, enhancing mobile responsiveness, streamlining navigation, and implementing advanced caching to accelerate page load times.SMTP and form configurations are complete, with email delivery nearly ready for activation. Additionally, all log files were checked, and the following updates were made to resolve errors and improve security: the underlying error contributing to vulnerabilities was fixed, Cloudflare Turnstile CAPTCHA was updated for enhanced bot and spam protection, anti-spam settings were reviewed and strengthened, and WPForms now includes IP verification with permanent blocking of malicious IPs responsible for SQL injection, remote code execution, directory reconnaissance, and xmlrpc brute force attacks. The next phase will address crawl issues and further refine the site's architecture for greater efficiency. A six-month blog content plan has been developed to drive ongoing growth through SEO-focused content, local search optimization, service promotions, industry insights, team spotlights, and regular performance reviews.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - L3 + AI (12 mo. commitment)
TimeEntry.Notes: Worked on the monthly report for DrFace, compiling key metrics, analyzing performance, and summarizing insights to provide a comprehensive overview of the month's activities and outcomes.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - L3 + AI (12 mo. commitment)
TimeEntry.Notes: Write and submit a blog post on the DrFace website "Is Non-Surgical Facelift Really Effective?" On-page SEO for the blog.This includes optimizing the title tag, meta description, and header tags with relevant keywords. The content should be structured for SEO by using appropriate keywords, adding internal and external links, optimizing images, and ensuring a mobile-friendly design. Additionally, the URL should be concise and keyword-rich to improve search engine visibility and user engagement.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - L3 + AI (12 mo. commitment)
TimeEntry.Notes: DrFace.com has recently undergone a comprehensive SEO and technical overhaul to improve search visibility, website performance, and the overall user experience. Key updates included fixing broken links, enhancing mobile responsiveness, streamlining navigation, and implementing advanced caching to accelerate page load times. SMTP and form configurations are complete, with email delivery nearly ready for activation. Additionally, all log files were checked, and several updates were made to resolve errors and improve security: the underlying error contributing to vulnerabilities was fixed, Cloudflare Turnstile CAPTCHA was updated for enhanced bot and spam protection, anti-spam settings were reviewed and strengthened, and WPForms now includes IP verification with permanent blocking of malicious IPs responsible for SQL injection, remote code execution, directory reconnaissance, and xmlrpc brute force attacks. The next phase will address crawl issues and further refine the site's architecture for greater efficiency. A six-month blog content plan has been developed to drive ongoing growth through SEO-focused content, local search optimization, service promotions, industry insights, team spotlights, and regular performance reviews.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - L3 + AI (12 mo. commitment)
TimeEntry.Notes: Searching for errors related to the DrFace website involves identifying and resolving issues affecting the site’s functionality, such as broken links, slow loading times, or errors during form submissions. By reviewing error logs, inspecting code, and checking server configurations, solutions can be implemented to ensure smooth user experience and performance.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - L3 + AI (12 mo. commitment)
TimeEntry.Notes: The broken links for DrFace were fixed, ensuring that all links on the website are now functioning properly and directing users to the correct pages. This helps maintain a smooth browsing experience for visitors and ensures all content is accessible.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - L3 + AI (12 mo. commitment)
TimeEntry.Notes: Write and submit a blog post on the DrFace website "How to Avoid Scarring After Facial Surgery " On-page SEO for the blog.This includes optimizing the title tag, meta description, and header tags with relevant keywords. The content should be structured for SEO by using appropriate keywords, adding internal and external links, optimizing images, and ensuring a mobile-friendly design. Additionally, the URL should be concise and keyword-rich to improve search engine visibility and user engagement.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - L3 + AI (12 mo. commitment)
TimeEntry.Notes:
DrFace.com has undergone a comprehensive SEO and technical overhaul to improve search visibility, performance, and user experience. Key updates include fixing broken links, enhancing mobile responsiveness, streamlining navigation, and implementing advanced caching to speed up load times. SMTP and form configurations are complete, with email delivery nearly activated.

Security improvements include fixing vulnerabilities, updating Cloudflare Turnstile CAPTCHA for enhanced bot protection, reviewing anti-spam settings, and adding IP verification in WPForms to block malicious IPs responsible for SQL injection, remote code execution, and brute force attacks.

The next phase will address crawl issues and further optimize site architecture. A six-month blog content plan has been developed for ongoing SEO growth, local search, service promotions, and industry insights.

Report for Today's Meeting:

  • Completed key updates for SEO, security, and performance.

  • Email configurations nearly ready for activation.

  • Security enhancements: CAPTCHA update, IP verification, and anti-spam measures.

  • Upcoming: Crawl issues resolution and architecture optimization.

  • Blog content plan in place for continued SEO and local growth.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - L3 + AI (12 mo. commitment)
TimeEntry.Notes:
Meeting With Marivic discuss create report and share with them

?? WEBSITE UPDATE ACTION ITEMS

 
?? STAFF PAGE
• Remove Natalie Landsman's photo and name
• Replace with Marie Smith (photo to be pulled from previous drface.com website)
• Update your title to: Cosmetic Nurse Practitioner-C (removing "RN" and "Nurse" — Nurse Practitioner is a higher qualification)
• Remove Laser Hair Removal from your listed services (in all locations on site)
• Fix name spelling to MARIVIC throughout the site
• Remove Conrad Robinson's name from the banner/surgical image
 
?? SERVICES & PROCEDURES
• Surgical Procedures: Add Neck Lift after Ear Surgery
• Rename to: Otoplasty (EAR Surgery)
• Non-Surgical Procedures: Add Skinvive and Radiesse
• Aesthetic Nurse Practitioner Procedures: Add Wellness & Weight Loss Program
• Remove the Laser Hair Removal page
• Add Buttock Augmentations under services
 
??? PHOTOS & IMAGERY
• Remove ALL syringe/needle images across the site — replace with beauty and relaxation imagery
• Add a male patient photo (late 40s–50s) to the Facelift page
• Add before & after photos of women in their 50s–60s
• Add a neck photo for the Botox / Platysmal Bands section
• Add PCA Skin, SkinMedica, and Allergan brand logos to the skincare section
• Upload additional images (age-appropriate, 30+ target audience)
 
?? CONTENT & PAGES
• Patient Resources: Add Allergan
• Patient Forms: Add Weight Loss forms once you email them to us
• Promotions Page: Update to read "Please call our office for current promotions"
• Out-of-Town Guests / Hotel Section: Remove outdated room pricing — replace with hotel phone numbers only
• Blog Content: Create posts on Wellness, Weight Loss, and Healthy Lifestyle topics
• Create a dedicated Wellness & Weight Loss Program service page
 
?? OFFICE HOURS
• Update to: Monday–Thursday: 9:00 AM – 4:00 PM | Friday: 9:00 AM – 1:00 PM
 
?? SECURITY
• Add Cloudflare security to contact forms to prevent spam submissions
• Set up a weekly form submission report so you can track all inquiries

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - L3 + AI (12 mo. commitment)
TimeEntry.Notes: Worked on DrFace SEO reporting, analyzing key performance metrics, identifying areas for improvement, and generating actionable insights to enhance search rankings, optimize content, and improve overall website visibility and performance.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - L3 + AI (12 mo. commitment)
TimeEntry.Notes: The task involves updating content on the DrFace website, specifically removing all images of doctors with injections. These visuals will be replaced with imagery that conveys beauty, relaxation, and a calming atmosphere. The goal is to shift the site’s tone to one that emphasizes non-invasive treatments in a more soothing and welcoming way. Additionally, content will be refreshed to reflect the brand's updated messaging and visual style, improving the overall user experience.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - L3 + AI (12 mo. commitment)
TimeEntry.Notes: Created and designed a new webpage for the DrFace website, ensuring proper structure and content alignment. Developed a high-quality featured image to enhance visual appeal, implemented on-page SEO including keywords, meta tags, and optimization techniques, and successfully published the page, ensuring improved visibility, performance, and user engagement.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - L3 + AI (12 mo. commitment)
TimeEntry.Notes: Created DrFace pages and implemented internal linking strategy to improve site structure, enhance user navigation, strengthen SEO performance, and increase content discoverability across the website.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - L3 + AI (12 mo. commitment)
TimeEntry.Notes: Write and submit a blog post on the DrFace website "Best Facial Rejuvenation Treatments for the Winter Season" On-page SEO for the blog. This includes optimizing the title tag, meta description, and header tags with relevant keywords. The content should be structured for SEO by using appropriate keywords, adding internal and external links, optimizing images, and ensuring a mobile-friendly design. Additionally, the URL should be concise and keyword-rich to improve search engine visibility and user engagement.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - L3 + AI (12 mo. commitment)
TimeEntry.Notes: As discussed in the meeting with Marivic, the following updates and actions will be implemented on the website: For the Staff Page, remove Natalie Landsman's photo and name, replace it with Marie Smith's photo from the previous drface.com website, update her title to "Cosmetic Nurse Practitioner-C," and remove "RN" and "Nurse" from the title. Additionally, remove Laser Hair Removal from the listed services at all locations, correct the spelling of Marivic’s name throughout the site, and remove Conrad Robinson’s name from the banner/surgical image. For Services & Procedures, add "Neck Lift after Ear Surgery" under surgical procedures, rename it to "Otoplasty (EAR Surgery)," add "Skinvive" and "Radiesse" under non-surgical procedures, introduce the "Wellness & Weight Loss Program" under Aesthetic Nurse Practitioner Procedures, and remove the Laser Hair Removal page. Additionally, add "Buttock Augmentations" under services. Under Photos & Imagery, remove all syringe/needle images and replace them with beauty and relaxation imagery, add a male patient photo (late 40s–50s) to the Facelift page, add before & after photos of women in their 50s–60s, add a neck photo for the Botox/Platysmal Bands section, and add logos of PCA Skin, SkinMedica, and Allergan to the skincare section. Additionally, upload age-appropriate images targeting a 30+ audience. For Content & Pages, add Allergan to Patient Resources, include Weight Loss forms once received, update the Promotions Page to "Please call our office for current promotions," remove outdated room pricing on the Out-of-Town Guests / Hotel Section, replace it with hotel phone numbers, create blog posts on Wellness, Weight Loss, and Healthy Lifestyle topics, and create a dedicated Wellness & Weight Loss Program service page. Under Office Hours, update to: Monday–Thursday: 9:00 AM – 4:00 PM | Friday: 9:00 AM – 1:00 PM. For Security, add Cloudflare security to contact forms to prevent spam submissions, and set up a weekly form submission report to track all inquiries. A report will be created and shared with Marivic for review.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - L3 + AI (12 mo. commitment)
TimeEntry.Notes: Checked DrFace for issues and performance, addressing identified problems and implementing suggested changes to improve functionality and user experience, as per the client's recommendations.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - L3 + AI (12 mo. commitment)
TimeEntry.Notes: Write and submit a blog post on the DrFace website "Why Facial Botox is Ideal for Summer: Protecting Your Skin " On-page SEO for the blog. This includes optimizing the title tag, meta description, and header tags with relevant keywords. The content should be structured for SEO by using appropriate keywords, adding internal and external links, optimizing images, and ensuring a mobile-friendly design. Additionally, the URL should be concise and keyword-rich to improve search engine visibility and user engagement.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - L3 + AI (12 mo. commitment)
TimeEntry.Notes: As discussed with Marivic, key updates will include replacing Natalie Landsman’s photo with Marie Smith’s and updating her title, correcting Marivic’s name spelling, and removing Conrad Robinson’s name from the banner. The Services page will be updated with new procedures like "Otoplasty," "Skinvive," "Radiesse," "Wellness & Weight Loss Program," and "Buttock Augmentations," while Laser Hair Removal will be removed. Photos will be refreshed with beauty and relaxation imagery, and new patient images will be added. Content updates include adding Allergan to Patient Resources, updating the Promotions page, creating blog posts on wellness topics, and a dedicated Wellness & Weight Loss Program page. Office hours will be revised, Cloudflare security will be added to forms, and a weekly report on form submissions will be created for Marivic’s review. SEO and settings will be updated across the site.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - L3 + AI (12 mo. commitment)
TimeEntry.Notes: Collaborated closely with the client to develop and refine the DrFace webpages according to their specific requirements. Designed and created a customized webpage, aligning the design, functionality, and content with the client's vision. Ensured the final product met expectations and delivered an optimized user experience.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - L3 + AI (12 mo. commitment)
TimeEntry.Notes: Redesigned new pages for DrFace, focusing on improving user experience, enhancing visual appeal, and ensuring alignment with the brand’s identity and content strategy for better engagement and functionality.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - L3 + AI (12 mo. commitment)
TimeEntry.Notes: Webpages for DrFace were created, including detailed design and content tailored to the brand’s goals. The structure was optimized for user engagement, ensuring smooth navigation and clear information on facial surgery and post-surgery care. SEO optimization and responsive design were also implemented for better visibility and accessibility across devices.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - L3 + AI (12 mo. commitment)
TimeEntry.Notes: Update the content of the following pages on the DrFace website: Non-Surgical Procedures, Facial Liposuction, Lip Enhancement, and Dermabrasion. This includes enhancing the text, improving readability, adding relevant information, and ensuring all content is up to date. The in-page updates will be completed for each of these pages, ensuring that they provide accurate and engaging details about each procedure while maintaining consistency with the website's overall design and tone.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - L3 + AI (12 mo. commitment)
TimeEntry.Notes: A webpage for DrFace was created, focusing on providing detailed information about facial surgery and post-surgery care. The design was user-friendly, with clear navigation and engaging content to help visitors understand services. SEO optimization was implemented for better search engine ranking, and the page was published for easy access.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - L3 + AI (12 mo. commitment)
TimeEntry.Notes: As discussed with Marivic, key updates to the website will include replacing Natalie Landsman’s photo with Marie Smith’s and updating her title, correcting Marivic’s name spelling, and removing Conrad Robinson’s name from the banner. The Services page will be updated with new procedures like "Otoplasty," "Skinvive," "Radiesse," "Wellness & Weight Loss Program," and "Buttock Augmentations," while "Laser Hair Removal" will be removed. Photos will be refreshed with beauty and relaxation imagery, and new patient images will be added. Content updates will include adding Allergan to Patient Resources, updating the Promotions page, creating blog posts on wellness topics, and developing a dedicated Wellness & Weight Loss Program page. Office hours will be revised, Cloudflare security will be added to forms, and a weekly report on form submissions will be created for Marivic’s review. Additionally, SEO and technical settings will be updated across the site to ensure optimal performance and improved visibility. These updates will be implemented using custom HTML for proper design and functionality.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - L3 + AI (12 mo. commitment)
TimeEntry.Notes: Designed and developed a new webpage for the DrFace website, ensuring proper layout and structure. Added relevant images to enhance visual appeal and user engagement, optimized the content for clarity and presentation, and successfully published the page to make it live and accessible to users.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - L3 + AI (12 mo. commitment)
TimeEntry.Notes: Created a webpage for the DrFace website, ensuring the layout was clear, visually appealing, and aligned with the brand. Organized the content effectively, added the necessary design elements, and prepared the page for a professional online presence to support user engagement and overall website functionality.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - L3 + AI (12 mo. commitment)
TimeEntry.Notes: Update the content of the following pages on the DrFace website: https://drface.com/non-surgical-procedures/dermasculpt/ , https://drface.com/non-surgical-procedures/juvederm/, https://drface.com/non-surgical-procedures/restylane/ and https://drface.com/non-surgical-procedures/voluma/ This includes enhancing the text, improving readability, adding relevant information, and ensuring all content is up to date. The in-page updates will be completed for each of these pages, ensuring that they provide accurate and engaging details about each procedure while maintaining consistency with the website's overall design and tone.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - L3 + AI (12 mo. commitment)
TimeEntry.Notes: The website has been completely redesigned with updated page layouts, improved user experience, and enhanced SEO settings to ensure better performance and visibility. Key updates include content and team changes such as replacing Natalie Landsman’s photo with Marie Smith’s, correcting Marivic’s name, and removing Conrad Robinson from the banner. The Services page has been expanded with new offerings while outdated ones have been removed, alongside refreshed visuals and new patient imagery. Additional improvements include updated promotions, new wellness-focused blog content, a dedicated Wellness & Weight Loss Program page, revised office hours, and enhanced form security with Cloudflare. Technical enhancements such as optimized site structure, tracking updates, and a persona-based SEO strategy have also been implemented, with ongoing reporting and custom HTML integrations ensuring consistent performance and functionality.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - L3 + AI (12 mo. commitment)
TimeEntry.Notes: Write and submit a blog post on the DrFace website "How to Prepare Your Skin for Spring with Non-Surgical Treatments" On-page SEO for the blog. This includes optimizing the title tag, meta description, and header tags with relevant keywords. The content should be structured for SEO by using appropriate keywords, adding internal and external links, optimizing images, and ensuring a mobile-friendly design. Additionally, the URL should be concise and keyword-rich to improve search engine visibility and user engagement.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - L3 + AI (12 mo. commitment)
TimeEntry.Notes: Worked on creating and developing pages for DrFace, ensuring alignment with branding, content structure, and SEO best practices to enhance user experience and overall website performance.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - L3 + AI (12 mo. commitment)
TimeEntry.Notes: Generated and developed a new webpage for the DrFace website by creating well-structured, informative, and engaging content tailored to the target audience. Ensured proper page layout, formatting, and visual consistency with the brand. Applied SEO best practices including keyword optimization, meta tags, and headings, followed by review, refinement, and successful publication.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - L3 + AI (12 mo. commitment)
TimeEntry.Notes: Write and submit a blog post on the DrFace website "How Long Do Botox and Fillers Last? A Complete Guide " On-page SEO for the blog. This includes optimizing the title tag, meta description, and header tags with relevant keywords. The content should be structured for SEO by using appropriate keywords, adding internal and external links, optimizing images, and ensuring a mobile-friendly design. Additionally, the URL should be concise and keyword-rich to improve search engine visibility and user engagement.

TimeEntry.Title: My SEO - L3 + AI (12 mo. commitment)
TimeEntry.Notes: The website has been completely redesigned and optimized to enhance layout, user experience, and SEO, following a detailed audit to identify and resolve issues. All pages were improved with on-page SEO updates, optimized images, refined content, and stronger internal linking, while plugins and settings were fully configured for performance and security. Content updates included team and service revisions, new visuals, promotions, blog additions, and a dedicated Wellness & Weight Loss page, along with operational improvements like updated office hours and enhanced form security via Cloudflare. Technical upgrades such as improved site structure, tracking setup, and a persona-based SEO strategy have been implemented, supported by ongoing KPI monitoring, reporting, and continuous performance optimization.
